creator: numisemis@yahoo.com
text:
--- Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of www/pear-HTML_AJAX,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/108658 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108658

It seems that this PR is missing the patch itself that should fix pkg-descr.
